info.name: LMS — Admin (v1)
info.description:
School-admin (role: admin / sub-admin) APIs for the mobile app.

Covers: Profile / School Info, Announcements, Calendar events and Enquiries. All routes require a Bearer token (Sanctum) belonging to an admin/sub-admin user. Set `baseUrl` and `authToken` environment variables.

Note: Calendar listing/detail reuse the shared Calendar collection (`POST /calendar/events`, `GET /calendar/events/{id}`) — only event create/update/delete are admin-only and live here.

request.description: Returns user, organization (logo), school_info (about/website/email/mobile/address/USM/custom_sections), management_team[] and documents[].
Multipart. `photo` = image (max 2MB). Updates the organization logo.

body.raw:
{
  "about_school": "A premier school",
  "website_info": "Visit us online",
  "website_url": "https://example.com",
  "school_email": "info@example.com",
  "school_mobile": "9876543210",
  "school_address": "123 Street, City",
  "usm_vision": "...",
  "usm_mission": "...",
  "usm_values": "...",
  "usm_goals": "...",
  "custom_sections": [ { "title": "History", "description": "Founded in 1990" } ]
}

request.description: Replaces the school info text fields, USM and custom_sections. Returns the full refreshed profile.
new_password must differ from current and be min 8 chars with upper+lower case, a number and a symbol.
Returns { announcements: [...], stats: { total, this_month } } for the admin's organization.
event_type: class | exam | meeting | event | holiday. When is_all_day=false, send start_time/end_time as HH:mm.
Returns { tab, enquiries: [...], stats: { total, pending, replied }, tab_totals: { teacher, student } }.
tab in the path is teacher | student. Marks the enquiry as replied.
Classes with their sections, for dropdowns.
Blocked if sections still exist; orphans students.
Flattened card payload + QR (data-URI). Replace student with teacher|employee.
Replace chapter with topic to clear a topic.
Replace chapter with topic for topic MCQs.
Classes (with sections) + active teachers + day names.
